records.ety: [All + way. The s is an adverbial (orig. a genitive) ending.]

defs: At all times; ever; perpetually; throughout all time; continually; as, God is always the same.
quotes: Even in Heaven his [Mammon's] looks and thoughts.

defs: Constancy during a certain period, or regularly at stated intervals; invariably; uniformly; -- opposed to sometimes or occasionally.
quotes: He always rides a black galloway.
